commit.message:
fix: Only show "archived/reverted" messages on assembly phase

During training, many indy, field, methods, and classes are logged
as "reverted" because they are being cleaned up to be able to process
them during assembly phase to properly store them.

The "archived/reverted" messages are therefore confusing, somehow
misleading into thinking that some of those assets are not going to
be stored on the AOT cache. But then they are, indeed, stored,
during assembly.
